## Why this helps ANT

## Checklist

- [ ] Improves clarity, safety, portability, or localization.
- [ ] Does not add unnecessary jargon.
- [ ] Risky actions still require confirmation.
- [ ] Examples are respectful and non-condescending.
- [ ] Main `SKILL.md` remains compact enough to load easily.
- [ ] Does not add `curl | sh`, telemetry, secret collection, unsafe install steps, or instructions that bypass user confirmation.
- [ ] Changes to `skills/`, `variants/`, `tools/`, `.github/`, `AGENTS.md`, or `SECURITY.md` have owner review.
